features.name: Genomic Data Viewer
features.description: Interactive visualization of genomic data files and their annotations, surfaced as a JSON file viewer and info panel within the Datagrok platform.
features.evidence_summary: previewGenomeBrowse is the fileViewer entry point for JSON genomic files; info and the info-panel docs confirm annotation context is surfaced in the platform's info panel area.

features.name: Genome Config Validation
features.description: Plugin startup check and genome configuration validation that guards activation of visualization features until a valid genome config is confirmed.
features.evidence_summary: autostartChecker (autostart role) and checkGenomeConfig (string→bool) share a lifecycle purpose: validate genome configuration before activating the viewer.
